description_long: This is a tall, rectangular black cabinet or shelving unit with a prominent overhanging top section. The front features multiple open shelves of varying heights and three lower compartments with doors, each equipped with a small round handle. The sides are solid and flat, with no visible openings or features, while the back is a plain, uninterrupted panel. The overall construction appears robust, likely intended for urban environments such as bus stops, public spaces, or garages. The finish is matte to semi-gloss, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The unit is designed to store or display items securely, with both open and closed storage options.
description: A tall, black cabinet with open shelves and three lower doors, topped by a wide overhanging section. Its sturdy, modern design is suited for urban public or utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple open shelves and three lower doors with small handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and solid, featureless side panel of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted back panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a solid, flat surface.
